assertions.title: Pre-flight inventory is mapped into BenchmarkReport.system_inventory

steps.expected: CLI should re-render a saved report cleanly on this non-GPU host and expose populated `system_inventory` fields.
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and printed `system_inventory` with GPU UUID/name/driver/CUDA/memory plus `kernel_version`, `cpu_model`, `numa_nodes`, and `pytorch_version`.

steps.expected: A persisted fixture-driven report should contain top-level `system_inventory` derived from the pre-flight section metrics.
steps.observed: Temporary report was written under the assigned namespace and its top-level `system_inventory.gpus` contained 2 GPUs alongside the expected kernel/CPU/NUMA/PyTorch fields.

steps.expected: Targeted CLI/report enrichment tests should pass.

terminalOutput: `ornn-bench report /tmp/benchcore-report-enriched.json --json` showed `kernel_version = 5.15.0-91-generic`, `cpu_model = Intel(R) Xeon(R) Platinum 8480+`, `numa_nodes = 2`, `pytorch_version = 2.1.2`, and 2 populated GPU records.

assertions.title: Manifest section is mapped into BenchmarkReport.manifest

steps.expected: A persisted fixture-driven report should carry the manifest section output into the top-level `manifest` field.
steps.observed: Temporary report was written with a populated top-level `manifest` object containing `entries` and `summary`.

steps.expected: CLI JSON output should expose the populated top-level `manifest`.
steps.observed: Command exited 0 and printed `manifest.entries` with produced artifacts plus `manifest.summary` showing `total = 21`, `produced = 21`, `skipped = 0`, `missing = 0`.

steps.expected: Targeted enrichment tests should prove manifest mapping from section output.

terminalOutput: `ornn-bench report /tmp/benchcore-report-enriched.json --json` printed a top-level `manifest.entries` list containing 21 produced artifacts.
The same JSON output showed `manifest.summary.total = 21`, `produced = 21`, `skipped = 0`, and `missing = 0`.

steps.action: Run `./.venv/bin/ornn-bench info` on the macOS non-GPU host.
steps.expected: Command should succeed and provide actionable remediation instead of a Python traceback.
steps.observed: Command exited 0, showed Darwin/Apple M4 system info, reported `nvidia-smi` missing, and printed install/build guidance for NVIDIA drivers, nvbandwidth, and nccl-tests with no traceback.

steps.action: Run `./.venv/bin/ornn-bench report tests/fixtures/sample_report.json --json` and `./.venv/bin/ornn-bench report tests/fixtures/sample_report.json`.
steps.expected: Both report modes should render cleanly without GPU tooling and without raw Python tracebacks.
steps.observed: Both commands exited 0. JSON mode printed the report payload, and plain mode rendered report metadata, section statuses, scores, and qualification with no traceback.

steps.expected: CLI regression tests for `info` and `report` should pass on the non-GPU host.
steps.observed: 54/54 tests passed, covering clean exit behavior and no-traceback assertions for both commands.

terminalOutput: `ornn-bench info` exited 0 and printed `nvidia-smi not found on PATH` plus actionable remediation instead of a traceback.
`ornn-bench report tests/fixtures/sample_report.json --json` exited 0 and printed valid JSON.
`ornn-bench report tests/fixtures/sample_report.json` exited 0 and rendered report metadata, section statuses, scores, component metrics, and qualification without any `Traceback`.

frictions.description: This macOS host has no NVIDIA tooling, so `ornn-bench run` cannot be exercised live for report enrichment.
frictions.resolution: Used the required fixture-driven path: targeted pytest plus a temporary report generated under `/tmp/benchcore-report-enriched.json` from `_make_enriched_runners()`.

frictions.description: `tests/fixtures/sample_report.json` and `tests/fixtures/sample_scored_report.json` keep `manifest` empty, so the direct CLI fixture path alone cannot validate manifest mapping.
frictions.resolution: Validated VAL-CORE-005 with the temporary enriched report and the manifest mapping tests in `tests/runbook/test_manifest_and_durability.py`.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Live CLI checks (`info`, `report` JSON, and `report` plain) stayed clean on the non-GPU macOS host, and 54 targeted pytest cases passed using `--basetemp=/tmp/benchcore-report-pytest`.
